div1.entryFree:
Signory, 1) principality: through all the --es it was the first, Tp. I, 2, 71.
2) estate, landed property of a lord; manor: you have fed upon my --es, R2 III, 1, 22. restored to all his lands and --es, IV, 89. H4B IV, 1, 111.
3) the aristocracy, or the grand council of Venice: my services which I have done the s. Oth. I, 2, 18.
4) spelling of seniory (q. v.) in O. Edd.
